degenerate_diagnostic.rule: degenerate = constant ranks on parametric OR LLM side; Spearman ρ then undefined (scipy ConstantInputWarning) and skipped from rho_summary. top-1 with constant ranks deterministically falls to common_pols[0] via argmin tie-breaking — possible fake match.
